title: Xtra Garlicky Uruguayan Squid Empanadas
description: A garlicky and crumbly Uruguayan dish featuring squid, this empanada is a perfect hangover cure, shaped like nigiri and egg-free friendly, served on a talavera plate.

ingredients.name: squid
ingredients.notes: cleaned and cut into small pieces

instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the onion and garlic until softened.
Add the squid to the skillet and cook until opaque and tender.
Season the squid mixture with salt, black pepper, and parsley.
Roll out the empanada dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
Place a tablespoon of the squid mixture onto the center of each dough circle.
Brush the edges of the dough with lemon juice and fold the dough in half to form a half-moon shape.
Press the edges together to seal the empanada and shape into a nigiri-like form.
Brush the tops of the empanadas with olive oil and bake for 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
